What You Get
Everything you need.
Ready in 60 seconds.
Tell the AI about your brand once. It handles research and writing every week. You just copy and post.
🔍
Core Intelligence
Live Trend Research — Every Time
Before writing anything, the AI checks what people are searching and talking about in your niche right now — not 6 months ago. Your posts always feel fresh and timely.
gym recovery protocolHot
creatine loading mythsRising
zone 2 vs HIIT 2026New
sleep + muscle growthHot
🎬
Video Scripts
Word-for-Word Reel & Short Scripts
Get a complete word-for-word script with simple camera directions. Just read it to your phone and film. No editing needed.
HookBodyCTA[Direction]
📝
Captions
Platform-Native Copy
Each caption is written specifically for that platform. Instagram reads differently from LinkedIn. YouTube is different from Threads. Always.
🎠
Carousels
Canva-Ready Slides
Each slide has a headline, body text and call-to-action already written. Paste it into Canva and your carousel is done in minutes.
#️⃣
Discovery
Hashtag Strategy
Real hashtags researched for each post — a mix of popular and niche tags. Never the same ones twice.
🧵
Long-Form
Thread Writer Built In
Full Twitter/X threads and Threads posts already written and split into individual tweets. One click to copy each one.
✅
Execution
Posting Checklist + Best Time
Every post comes with the best time to post, a step-by-step plan, and one tip that can double your reach in the first 30 minutes.
The Process
From brief to live
post in 60 seconds.
You don't need to know anything about AI or content. Just answer a few questions about your brand once — the system does the rest every week.
01
Brief your brand
Answer a few simple questions about your brand — what you do, who your customers are, and how you like to sound. The AI remembers all of this forever.
Brand voiceAudience profilingTone calibration
02
AI researches & writes
The AI searches the internet to find what's actually trending in your space right now. Then it writes 3 complete posts — different every single week.
Live researchPlatform-nativeTrend-first
03
Copy, paste, post
Hit copy on your caption. Read your script to camera. Paste your slides into Canva. Follow the checklist. You're done.
One-click copyCanva-readyBest-time schedule
Social Proof
Real people.
Real results.

"Paid a freelancer ₹18,000 for 8 generic posts. Social Ninja's costs less, delivers more, and sounds exactly like my brand. First time my content has a real strategy."

P

Skincare brand · Mumbai

"Went from 2K to 18K followers in 3 months. The scripts are unreal — I just read them on camera and engagement went through the roof."

"We run 4 platforms and were spending 15 hours a week on content. Now it's 30 minutes. Carousel copy alone saves ₹12,000/month."

FAQ
Got questions? Here are the answers.
3 complete posts written for your specific brand — captions, a video script, carousel slides and hashtags. No credit card required. After your 3 free posts, you can choose to upgrade if you like what you see.
It really searches the internet before writing. Every post is based on what's actually happening in your niche this week. No recycled templates.
Instagram, YouTube, LinkedIn, Facebook, Twitter/X, Threads and Pinterest. Starter: 2. Growth: 4. Pro: all 7.
When you set up your profile, you describe how you talk and what your brand is about. The AI uses that every time it writes for you. Your followers won't be able to tell the difference.
ChatGPT needs you to know exactly what to ask and how to structure it. Social Ninja's does everything automatically — searches for trends, remembers your brand, writes platform-specific posts and tells you when to post. No prompting skills needed at all.
Cancel whenever you want. No contracts, no lock-in, no cancellation fees. Just email us at hello@socialninjas.in.
